name: render-glow-outline

name: render-uniform-stroke

description: Shapes repeat around a center, generating rotational symmetry and arena-like composition.

description: Glow intensity increases gradually to represent energy accumulation visually.

name: background-noise-field

name: background-fractal-motif
description: Recursive motifs generate richness using simple algorithmic rules.

name: background-flow-lines

name: background-particle-layer
description: Drifting particles add scale and atmosphere while preserving abstraction.

name: background-moire-pattern

name: lighting-layered-fog
